proof:
calc
have h : constApproxError2 u0 u1 c = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * ((cellAverage2 u0 u1) - c) ^ 2 := by
  unfold constApproxError2 p0ProjectionResidualSq2 cellAverage2
  ring
rw [h]
nlinarith

unfold p0Projection2Left p0Projection2Right cellAverage2
field_simp
ring

unfold weightedP0Average
by_cases hsum : (∑ i ∈ s, m i) = 0
· simp [hsum]
· field_simp [hsum]
rw [← Finset.mul_sum]
refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i hi => ?_
ring

have hsum := hmass
unfold weightedP0Residual weightedP0Average
simp [mul_sub, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hsum]
ring

obtain ⟨hL, hR⟩ := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
calc
  |laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight|
      = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := rfl
  _ ≤ |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := abs_add_le _ _ _
  _ = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl| * |uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl| * |uRight| := by simp [abs_mul]
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl) * |uLeft| + (laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * |uRight| := by rw [abs_of_nonneg hL, abs_of_nonneg hR]
  _ ≤ (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl) * M + (laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by
    apply add_le_add
    · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hL
    · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hR
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by ring
  _ = 1 * M := by rw [laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl]
  _ = M := by ring

unfold weightedP0Average
field_simp [hmass]
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
· constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

have h : kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c) = fun _ => 3 * c ^ 2 := by
    ext i; exact kdvCanonicalFlux_const c i
  rw [h]
  exact fluxDifference_const_zero (3 * c ^ 2) i

apply max_le.mpr
constructor
· calc
|diag2First a x| = |a * x| := rfl
_ = |a| * |x| := abs_mul a x
_ ≤ rho * |x| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
_ ≤ rho * vec2InfNorm x y := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_left_le_vec2InfNorm x y) hrho
· calc
|diag2Second b y| = |b * y| := rfl
_ = |b| * |y| := abs_mul b y
_ ≤ rho * |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
_ ≤ rho * vec2InfNorm x y := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_right_le_vec2InfNorm x y) hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
rw [hsum]
simp

unfold centeredSignal finiteMean finiteDC
simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard]
ring
